title: Flickingeria purpureostelidia

The genus Flickingeria is a group of orchids, and Flickingeria purpureostelidia is a specific species within this genus. The classification of Flickingeria purpureostelidia includes its kingdom as Plantae, phylum as Liliopsida, and order as Asparagales.
